title: Buttery Smoky Russian Prawns Wrap
description: A rich, comforting dish featuring prawns, smoky flavors, and a velvety butter sauce, wrapped in a low-carb pandan leaf wrap. Best enjoyed as a satisfying dinner
instructions: Heat a robata grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Melt 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and smoked paprika to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the lobster butter until melted and smooth.
Add the chopped dill, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked prawns to the saucepan and toss to coat with the butter sauce.
Warm the pandan leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the prawn and butter mixture onto the center of each wrap, then folding the bottom half up over the filling and rolling up to form a tight cylinder.
